isi.lyrics:
Lyric JUNNY - Dangerous

Romanization

My memories fried, she never gets tired
Movin’ from place to place
She empty a glass, I’d tell her I’ll pass
Cuz you know I ain’t playin’ no games
 
I let my thoughts run out the door
Another night, new regrets
A reason why I’m strung out over you
 
Cuz lately you be dangerous, dangerous
I’m thinking
My mind is saying are we in love?
Cuz I’m just done pretendin’
 
I want you, I can’t lie
But I can’t cross that line
Cuz lately you be dangerous, dangerous
It’s killin’ me
 
Yeah, it’s getting’ harder to figure you out
The more emotions
I be giving it’s bringing you down
Some call it nonsense, nothin’ but the conscious
Tellin’ me chemicals ain’t the only thing that’s toxic
 
On second thought I just need to be alone
Only hear from you when you’re tipsy on the phone
Sugar & spice, make everything nice
But girl I don’t know about you
 
Cuz lately you be dangerous, dangerous
I’m thinking
My mind is saying are we in love?
Cuz I’m just done pretendin’
 
I want you, I can’t lie
But I can’t cross that line
Cuz lately you be dangerous, dangerous
It’s killin’ me
 
Took my days and hours away
Every touch I go insane
Ask me to come a lil closer
But wantin’ to take it slow
 
Oh she took my life away
With this love, no she don’t play
And I just wanna hear u calling
Wantin’ to make
Wantin’ to make me yours

Lyric JUNNY - limbo (Feat. Colde)

Romanization

Tell me
Do you know what your heart desires?
Cuz I’m just playin’ this game you like
Don’t know how much I have left inside
Stuck in limbo, limbo
 
Tell me
Do you know what your heart desires?
Cuz I’m just playin’ this game you like
Don’t know how much I have left inside
Stuck in limbo, limbo
 
I mean how can I show you love?
I mean how can you feel my love?
I mean how can I fill that trust?
I mean how can you feel that trust?
 
I’m feelin’ blessed when I get like this
I’m taking all of the chance I get
Cuz I feel like we be on something
We taking off till we start again
 
True feelings grown
From the mind to the soul
Set it off, sick and tired of the regular
Cuz you the one to make it last
Give my all, that’s the plan
Promise you oh, on god
I be needing you the most
 
Tell me
Do you know what your heart desires?
Cuz I’m just playin’ this game you like
Don’t know how much I have left inside
Stuck in limbo, limbo, limbo,
Limbo, limbo, limbo
Tell me
 
Can’t you stop forcing me all about your needs?
All the conversations, that we didn‘t mean
Now you’re sugarcoating us calling it peace
I’ll just let it go that way, I’ll say indeed yeah
 
Don’t know who we‘re blaming
Guess it’s 50:50
Was so dumb to wonder what’s the point of standing so still
Guess now it‘s too late to bring back
All of the feelings that we had
Even on radio, our story playing is reaching it’s end

Lyric JUNNY - Provider

Romanization

Let me be your provider
Ain’t nothin’ there to confuse
i mareun simple reminder
I ain’t just here to intrude
 
I got that feeling in my stomach
That you want me a little
Harder better faster stronger
So let me be that provider
Cuz I ain’t someone
That you shouldn’t be confused with
 
(Oh what you say is what you are)
Tell me how bad do you want it
Begging for it baby uh
(Oh what I ask is what I want)
You take the best of me
Then you ask for it even more
 
Drowning in your water catch the waves yeah
Make you the feel the magic in the air
(Breathin’ you in and breathin’ out)
Tell me how bad do you want it
Begging for it baby oh
 
A bit of everything that you wanted
Focus on me,
Yeah that energy I keep flaunting
So let me be that provider
Driving in your lane
Oh I’ll deliver baby, so be it
 
(Too many times, too many lies)
Got you trippin’ up on all that you see
(I’ll show you love, I’ll show you mine)
But bet you won’t have no problems with me
 
(Oh what you say is what you are)
Tell me how bad do you want it
Begging for it baby uh

isi.lyrics:
Lyric JUNNY - Sweet Release

Romanization

I’m wide awake the thought of being with you
On second thought I don’t believe that it’s true
Oh you’re just way too good for me
Right you be so damn good to me
 
Just understand my mind is running confused
You’d be the only one feeling I can’t control
Emotional
 
The way you run those fingers down on my back
I keep runnin’, I keep seeping out
Fix me to the time you barely have
I’ll keep on lovin’, keep on giving
 
I barely know you but it feels right, delight on my head
Too soon to ask to be mine
Never say never say
“Oh will we ever last?”
never say
 
Our love will come with ease
I’ll have you fallin’ for me
A bottle of dreams I’ve been pourin’ down on this place to be
 
Such a sweet release
Get you fallin’ for me
Sweet angel in disguise
This is how it’s supposed to be
Such a sweet, sweet release
 
Hanging by the view, right just by the shore
Yeah I’m holdin’ like I’ve never held before
Breeze so perfect breathing diamond gold
No one be this beautiful
Think this is love galore
 
Man I wish this would last forever
Ceremonial vision, mind came to fruition
For you I’d change for the better
I ain’t pure, that’s the truth
But better when I’m with you, yeah
